memories.caption: Our first homemade dinner together. We burned the rice but it was perfect.
The day we adopted Milo. He fell asleep in my arms on the way home.
Midnight stargazing on our balcony. We counted 47 shooting stars.
When we painted the kitchen yellow. It took three coats and two days.
The proposal. You said yes before I even finished the sentence.
Building our first garden. Your sunflowers grew taller than me!
Dancing in the rain after our engagement party. Best night ever.
Our first Christmas morning in our own home. Matching pajamas, of course.
